name: xero-mcp-server
description: Drive Xero from Claude: invoices, bills, payments, bank transactions, PDF attachments, billable expenses. Multi-tenant (bookkeepers), with Custom Connection (paid) or standard OAuth 2.0 (free) auth.
long_description: An MCP server that drives the Xero accounting API. Two auth modes: Xero Custom Connection (paid dev plan, single-tenant, no browser) or standard OAuth 2.0 (free plan, browser consent once, refresh-token persisted, multi-tenant). Bookkeepers can switch between client orgs at will using xero_list_tenants / xero_set_current_tenant. Tools cover: sales invoices (ACCREC), supplier bills (ACCPAY), payments, spend/receive-money bank transactions, contacts, chart of accounts, tax rates, PDF/image attachments, and a billable-expense workflow (flag bill lines as billable to a client, later generate a sales invoice from all their pending billable expenses). Includes a built-in xero_get_setup_help tool that works even without credentials.

tools.name: xero_get_setup_help
tools.description: Step-by-step Xero MCP setup instructions (free OAuth 2.0 or paid Custom Connection). Works without credentials.

tools.name: xero_list_tenants
tools.description: List every Xero org authorised under the current OAuth consent (for bookkeepers managing multiple clients)

tools.name: xero_get_current_tenant
tools.description: Show which Xero org is currently active

tools.name: xero_set_current_tenant
tools.description: Switch the active Xero organisation (OAuth mode only)

tools.name: xero_get_organisation
tools.description: Fetch organisation details (name, base currency, timezone, FY end)

tools.name: xero_list_accounts
tools.description: List chart of accounts; filter by type (BANK, REVENUE, EXPENSE, …)

tools.name: xero_list_tax_rates
tools.description: List tax rates available on this organisation

tools.name: xero_search_contacts
tools.description: Search customers and suppliers

tools.name: xero_create_contact
tools.description: Create a new contact

tools.name: xero_list_invoices
tools.description: List sales invoices (ACCREC)

tools.name: xero_get_invoice
tools.description: Fetch one invoice by UUID or number

tools.name: xero_create_invoice
tools.description: Create a sales invoice (defaults to DRAFT)

tools.name: xero_update_invoice
tools.description: Approve, void, or edit an invoice

tools.name: xero_list_bills
tools.description: List supplier bills (ACCPAY)

tools.name: xero_create_bill
tools.description: Create a supplier bill (defaults to DRAFT)

tools.name: xero_create_payment
tools.description: Apply a payment to an invoice or bill

tools.name: xero_list_payments
tools.description: List payments

tools.name: xero_list_bank_transactions
tools.description: List spend/receive-money bank transactions

tools.name: xero_create_bank_transaction
tools.description: Create a spend or receive money transaction

tools.name: xero_mark_bank_transaction_reconciled
tools.description: Flip is_reconciled on a bank transaction

tools.name: xero_attach_file_to_invoice_or_bill
tools.description: Attach a local PDF/image/etc. to an invoice or bill

tools.name: xero_list_invoice_attachments
tools.description: List files attached to an invoice or bill

tools.name: xero_flag_bill_line_as_billable
tools.description: Flag a bill line as a billable client expense (local store)

tools.name: xero_list_billable_expenses
tools.description: List pending or billed client expenses

tools.name: xero_generate_invoice_from_billable_expenses
tools.description: Create a sales invoice rolling up a client's pending billable expenses

tools.name: xero_unflag_billable_expense
tools.description: Delete or revert a billable expense record

xero_auth_mode.title: Auth mode
xero_auth_mode.description: 'custom_connection' (default, paid Xero dev plan, no browser) or 'oauth' (free plan, browser consent once). Leave blank for custom_connection.

xero_client_id.title: Xero Client ID
xero_client_id.description: Client ID from your Xero app (developer.xero.com/app/manage) — either a Custom Connection or a standard OAuth 2.0 web app.

xero_client_secret.title: Xero Client Secret
xero_client_secret.description: Client secret from the same Xero app — shown once when generated.

xero_tenant_id.title: Xero Tenant ID (OAuth only)
xero_tenant_id.description: Optional. In OAuth mode with multiple orgs, set this to a specific tenant UUID. Leave blank to use the first tenant granted during consent.
